query:
UPDATE reasoning.conversations
            SET container_pod_name = COALESCE($2, container_pod_name),
                container_status = $3,
                opencode_session_id = COALESCE($4, opencode_session_id),
                container_pod_ip = COALESCE($5, container_pod_ip),
                last_activity_at = now()
            WHERE id = $1
